characters.appearance: Young female, fair skin, red hair styled in an updo, large green eyes. 3D animated style.
characters.wardrobe: White top, gold crescent moon earrings.

characters.appearance: Young adult male, light skin, dark hair, short beard.
characters.wardrobe: Dark grey t-shirt, white wireless earbuds.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: Do you speak English? [Do you speak English?]
Character B says: Yes, I know English. [Yes, I know English.]
Character A says: Technically correct. Par native speakers bolte hain, "I speak English." [Technically correct. But native speakers say, "I speak English."]
Character B says: I speak English. [I speak English.]
Character A says: How old are you? [How old are you?]
Character B says: My age is 24. [My age is 24.]
Character A says: You mean... "I am 24 years old." [You mean... "I am 24 years old."]
Character B says: I am 24 years old. [I am 24 years old.]
Character A says: What is your name? [What is your name?]
Character B says: Myself Rahul. [Myself Rahul.]
Character A says: Native speakers normally say, "My name is Rahul." [Native speakers normally say, "My name is Rahul."]
Character B says: My name is Rahul. [My name is Rahul.]
Character A says: Well done! [Well done!]
Character B says: Thank you. Par aap kaun ho? [Thank you. But who are you?]
Character A says: Main Supernova par aapki AI tutor hoon. Hum aise hi roz practice kar sakte hain. [I am your AI tutor on Supernova. We can practice like this every day.]
Character B says: Par meri English weak hai. Main bol nahi pata. [But my English is weak. I can't speak.]
Character A says: Tension mat lo. Main aapko Hindi mein samjha kar English bolna sikhaungi. [Don't worry. I will explain in Hindi and teach you to speak English.]
Character B says: Aapko Hindi aati hai? [Do you know Hindi?]
Character A says: Bilkul, main ek AI hoon. [Of course, I am an AI.]
Character B says: Sahi hai. Main abhi app download karta hoon. [That's great. I am going to download this app right now.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer with relatable, common Indian-English mistakes and gentle corrections.
- Establishes the AI tutor's persona as a warm, non-judgmental guide.
- Addresses the core user anxiety ("my English is weak") by revealing the bilingual Hindi-to-English teaching feature.
- Ends with a clear, motivated call to action to download the app.

- Provides standard app store download badges to drive conversions.
